title: Allow timeline dates to be selected in automations like "push date" and "set date"

posts.author: abeblackburn (Abe Blackburn)
posts.cookedHtml:
Scenario: we have a company calendar that features recurring events. We use the ‘timeline’ column since some events run over the course of several days.

When the event ends, if it’s a recurring event, I want the timeline dates to be pushed by a certain amount of days.

Currently the ‘timeline’ column isn’t available to select in the ‘push date’ or ‘set date’ automations.
